globalNews.title: Venezuela quake survivor pulled out alive after eight days
globalNews.summary: Hernán Gil was trapped under a collapsed multi-storey car park, and encouraged them as they inched closer to him.

globalNews.title: 'Most massive' Russian attack on Kyiv kills at least 20
globalNews.summary: Kyiv's mayor declares a day of mourning after the major drone and missile attack on the Ukrainian capital.

globalNews.title: People smuggler convicted in France found by BBC living in UK and seeking asylum
globalNews.summary: Once described as "the godfather" of French migrant camps, he has been working in a Leicestershire village.

globalNews.title: Canadian boy, 11, dies of rabies after waking to bat on his face
globalNews.summary: Rabies infections are rare in Canada. There have been 28 human deaths due to rabies in the country since 1924.

globalNews.title: China says pilot crashed small plane into skyscraper for 'personal reasons'
globalNews.summary: The 66-year-old, who died in the crash, had anxiety and referenced "ending his life" in his diary.

cryptoNews.title: The biggest blockchain upgrades still to come in 2026
cryptoNews.summary: From Ethereum’s Glamsterdam to Solana’s Alpenglow, 2026’s most important developments are protocol upgrades, not price charts.

cryptoNews.title: UK payments blueprint outlines tokenized payments for ‘multi-money ecosystem’
cryptoNews.summary: UK regulators published an update to a national retail payments blueprint, calling for infrastructure support for tokenization and interoperability with new forms of digital money.

cryptoNews.title: Aave brings V3 lending and GHO stablecoin to Monad
cryptoNews.summary: Aave launched its V3 lending protocol on Monad with 12 supported assets as the network commits $15 million in first-year incentives to build liquidity and adoption.

cryptoNews.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
cryptoNews.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.

cryptoNews.title: Standard Chartered, Circle bring USDC minting onto banking rails
cryptoNews.summary: Standard Chartered and Circle launch bank-led USDC minting and redemption for institutions, starting in Dubai’s DIFC with planned global expansion.

aiNews.title: Microsoft launches its own AI deployment company with $2.5 billion commitment
aiNews.summary: Microsoft follows Amazon, OpenAI, and Anthropic with its new AI deployment group.

aiNews.title: Yep, we’re using OpenClaw to date now
aiNews.summary: Ben Guez has "a bunch of potential international wives in [his] DMs," thanks to an automated script he set up using OpenClaw, Claude code, and Instagram trials.

aiNews.title: Indian tech tycoon bets $30M of his own money to build AI alternative to Microsoft Office
aiNews.summary: Neo is Bhavin Turakhia’s fifth venture and his latest involving enterprise software. This time he's taking on Microsoft Office and Google Apps with AI.

aiNews.title: SpaceX has an AI device prototype, and it sure sounds phone-ish
aiNews.summary: SpaceX reportedly showed investors a "handset-like" AI device before going public. It could be another signal SpaceX wants to expand into wireless.

aiNews.title: Ashton Kutcher leaving Sound Ventures to launch new VC firm with Morgan Beller
